Class FishCastTrigger

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.fishing.skill.trigger.FishCastTrigger
All Implemented Interfaces:
PassiveTrigger
public final class FishCastTrigger extends Object implements PassiveTrigger
Trigger token fired when a player casts their fishing rod (state FISHING).

Passives that reduce hook wait times write their fractional reductions into this token via addReduction(double). After all passives have fired, call applyToHook() to apply the combined reduction to the hook in a single pass, capped at 90%.

Supports debug tracing: passives call record(String, String, boolean) after contributing, and the skill reads traceEntries() to send the log to any watcher.

  • Constructor Details

    • FishCastTrigger

      public FishCastTrigger(org.bukkit.entity.FishHook hook)
      Parameters:
      hook - the hook entity for this cast

  • Method Details

    • hook

      public org.bukkit.entity.FishHook hook()
      Returns:
      the hook entity for this cast

    • addReduction

      public void addReduction(double fraction)
      Accumulates a fractional reduction contribution from a passive.
      Parameters:
      fraction - the reduction fraction to add, e.g. 0.15 for 15%

    • totalReduction

      public double totalReduction()
      Returns the total accumulated cast timer reduction fraction before capping.
      Returns:
      total reduction fraction; cap is applied separately in applyToHook()

    • applyToHook

      public void applyToHook()
      Applies the accumulated reduction to the hook's wait times. The combined reduction is capped at 0.9 (90%). Does nothing if the total reduction is zero or negative.

    • record

      public void record(String source, String description, boolean active)
      Description copied from interface: PassiveTrigger
      Records an ability's contribution to this trigger for debug tracing. No-op by default; override in concrete trigger classes that support tracing.
      Specified by:
      record in interface PassiveTrigger
      Parameters:
      source - display name of the contributing ability
      description - short human-readable description of what the ability did
      active - true if the contribution came from an active ability

    • traceEntries

      public List<TraceEntry> traceEntries()
      Description copied from interface: PassiveTrigger
      Returns all trace entries recorded on this trigger, in the order they were added. Returns an empty list by default.
      Specified by:
      traceEntries in interface PassiveTrigger
      Returns:
      recorded contributions, or an empty list if tracing is not supported
